item.title: A Former Top Trump Official Is Going After Prediction Markets
item.description: As the battle over prediction markets rages on, Mick Mulvaney is leading a new coalition that calls these platforms illegal gambling.

item.title: Best AirPods (2026): Which Apple Headphones Should You Buy?
item.description: From the AirPods Pro to the AirPods Max, these are the best headphones for your iPhone and beyond.

item.title: When the Internet Goes Dark, the Truth Goes With It
item.description: Palestinian journalist Plestia Alaqad on bearing witness, the fragile power of social media, and why documenting lived reality matters more than ever.

item.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
item.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.

item.title: Lenovo’s Latest Wacky Concepts Include a Laptop With a Built-in Portable Monitor
item.description: At MWC 2026, the company also showed off a dual-screen Yoga Book with 3D capabilities, and the Legion Go Fold—a gaming handheld with a folding screen ...
